title: Mega Glalie Battle Guide
summary: A balanced attacker with [refrigerate] — [return] becomes a boosted [Ice] STAB, and [explosion] turns into a spread [Ice] bomb.
weaknesses: Speed 100 is outrun by top-tier scarfers

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Glalie's gimmick is [refrigerate] — [Normal]-type moves become [Ice] with a 1.2x boost. The signature play is a [refrigerate]-boosted [explosion] that turns into an [Ice]-type STAB spread bomb. 120 Attack and 120 Special Attack allow mixed sets, though physical is usually the main plan.

## Strengths
[return] boosted by STAB and [refrigerate] is extremely high damage, and [explosion] is a nuclear finisher that scales into a spread [Ice] move. Symmetrical offensive stats let Mega Glalie flex into special coverage if needed.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Pure [Ice] has weaknesses to [Fighting], [Fire], [Rock], and [Steel] — a rough defensive profile. 80/80/80 bulk folds to any super-effective hit. Speed 100 loses to the upper tier.

## Recommended Moveset
[return] is the main spam. [explosion] is the game-ending finisher. [earthquake] covers [Steel] and [Fire] walls. [protect] secures Mega evolution.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[glalitite] is mandatory. [refrigerate] activates post-Mega. Tera [Ice] stacks on top of [refrigerate] for even bigger damage, while Tera [Ground] patches multiple weaknesses.

## Teammates & Synergy
[tailwind] support compensates for the modest Speed. Cover [Fire] and [Fighting] with [Water] and [Psychic] partners. Position Mega Glalie late-game so [explosion] clears the board when one of your slots is already sacrificial.

## Play Patterns
Play it as a standard attacker with [return] and [earthquake], then look for the moment where [explosion] trades Mega Glalie for two opposing KOs. [refrigerate] [explosion] is effectively the strongest spread move Mega Glalie has, and saving it for the right moment wins matches.
